dsps.name: 24-7 Entertainment
dsps.notes: Owned by 7digital. Powers Juke, Play.com, Media Markt, Saturn, TDC Play, Ex Libris, and more.

dsps.name: 3 Mobile
dsps.notes: Telecom company. Partnered with Deezer for music streaming in some territories.

dsps.name: 7digital
dsps.notes: White label music services that power other platforms. Owns 24-7 Entertainment.

dsps.name: AT&T Unlimited
dsps.notes: Telecom company. Bundles Amazon Music and Pandora Premium.

dsps.name: Baidu Music
dsps.notes: Merged with Taihe Music Group. Rebranded as Qianqian Music.

dsps.name: BlackBerry MP3 Music Store
dsps.notes: Seems to have been powered by 7digital, but no longer exists.

dsps.name: Bouygues Telecom
dsps.notes: Partnered with Spotify for music streaming.

dsps.name: Celcom (Yonder Music)
dsps.notes: Shut down, and then re-opened, even though website still doesn't work

dsps.name: Digi
dsps.notes: Telecom company. No data charge for music streaming.

dsps.name: Dynamic Media
dsps.notes: Premier US provider of SiriusXM for Business.

dsps.name: E-Onkyo Music
dsps.notes: Onkyo Music is the corresponding service for UK, Germany, and US.

dsps.name: Flipagram
dsps.notes: Acquired by Toutiao. Succeeded by Vigo Video.

dsps.name: Fnac
dsps.notes: Partnered with Deezer to provide streaming.

dsps.name: friDay Music
dsps.notes: Owned by Omusic and used to be branded as Omusic.

dsps.name: GhostTunes
dsps.notes: Launched by Garth Brooks. Acquired by Amazon and then shut down.

dsps.name: Groove Music
dsps.notes: Shut down. Partnered with Spotify to take over streaming.

dsps.name: HeartMusic
dsps.notes: Seems like it is shut down, but not sure.

dsps.name: InProdicon
dsps.notes: White label service that powers other platforms.

dsps.name: JioMusic
dsps.notes: Owned by Reliance. Being merged with Saavn.

dsps.name: Kanjian
dsps.notes: Also provides content to 30+ Asian platforms, such as Xiami, QQ Music, NetEase, Baidu, Kugou, etc.

dsps.name: Kuack Media Group
dsps.notes: White label music streaming services and content distribution.

dsps.name: Lukesbox
dsps.notes: Last seen online in 2011 according to the Wayback Machine.

dsps.name: Maxis Music Unlimited
dsps.notes: Telecom company. No data charge for music streaming, and can charge music subscription fee to carrier bill.

dsps.name: Media Markt
dsps.notes: Powered by 24-7 Entertainment. Partnered with Juke.

dsps.name: MediaNet
dsps.notes: Music services, database, and content provider.

dsps.name: Mi Music
dsps.notes: Owned by Xiaomi and powered by Hungama Music.

dsps.name: MixRadio
dsps.notes: Previously called Nokia Music. Owned by Line Corporation. Shut down.

dsps.name: Music Unlimited
dsps.notes: Owned by Sony. Succeeded by PlayStation Music.

dsps.name: MusicStation
dsps.notes: Owned by Omnifone. Powered Rara music service. Shut down.

dsps.name: Muve Music
dsps.notes: Assets acquired by Deezer. Shut down and encouraged users to switch to Deezer.

dsps.name: Netmusik
dsps.notes: Seems like the music library portion might have been taken down.

dsps.name: Neurotic Media
dsps.notes: White label music services that power other companies.

dsps.name: NMusic SA
dsps.notes: White label music services. Powers Altice.

dsps.name: Nowdio
dsps.notes: Seems to be offline now, but not sure. Powered by 7digital.

dsps.name: Official Charts Company (OCC)
dsps.notes: Music charts. Partnered with Millward Brown.

dsps.name: Omnifone
dsps.notes: Some assets acquired by Apple. Shut down.

dsps.name: Onkyo Music
dsps.notes: E-Onkyo Music is the corresponding version for Japan.

dsps.name: Orange
dsps.notes: Telecom music service powered by Deezer.

dsps.name: PlayStation Music
dsps.notes: Replaced Music Unlimited. Powered by Spotify.

dsps.name: Psonar
dsps.notes: Seems to be shut down now, but not sure.

dsps.name: Qianqian Music
dsps.notes: Rebrand of Taihe Group's Baidu Music.

dsps.name: RealNetworks
dsps.notes: Partnered with Napster for music streaming.

dsps.name: Saavn
dsps.notes: Acquired by Reliance. Being merged with JioMusic.

dsps.name: SFR Muzik
dsps.notes: Telecom music service powered by Digster.

dsps.name: Singtel Music
dsps.notes: Telecom company. No data charge for music streaming, and discounted rates on several of music services.

dsps.name: Songza
dsps.notes: Acquired by Google and merged into Google Play Music.

dsps.name: Starhub Music Anywhere
dsps.notes: Not sure if it is still active.

dsps.name: Synacor
dsps.notes: Music services. Partnered with ZUUS music videos.

dsps.name: T-Mobile Music Freedom
dsps.notes: Telecom company. No data charge for music streaming.

dsps.name: TargetMusic
dsps.notes: Owned by Target Media. Related somehow with Aim4music.

dsps.name: Tata DoCoMo
dsps.notes: Telecom company with various music services.

dsps.name: Telefonica
dsps.notes: Telecom company. Also owns O2 and Vivo. Music service powered by Napster at one point.

dsps.name: Telenor
dsps.notes: Telecom company. Partnered with TIDAL for music service.

dsps.name: Telia Sonera
dsps.notes: Telecom company and investor in Spotify. Partnered with Spotify for music services.

dsps.name: TELUS Mobility
dsps.notes: Telecom company. Partnered with Stingray Music.

dsps.name: U Mobile Music Onz
dsps.notes: Telecom company. No data charge for music streaming.

dsps.name: Uninor Unlimited Music
dsps.notes: Owned by Telenor. Music service seems to be shut down.

dsps.name: United Media Agency (UMA)
dsps.notes: Partnered with Mail.ru, VKontakte, Odnoklassniki, and BOOM. Music services and content delivery.

dsps.name: Verizon (Music Tones)
dsps.notes: Partnered with Slacker for music service.

dsps.name: Viettel Imusik
dsps.market: Cameroon, Dong Timor, Haiti, Mozambique, Tanzania, Vietnam

dsps.name: Vigo Video
dsps.notes: Owned by Toutiao. Used to be Flipagram.

dsps.name: Virgin Mega
dsps.notes: Acquired by Nike. Seems to be shut down.

dsps.name: We7
dsps.notes: Acquired by Tesco. Rebranded as Blinkbox.

dsps.name: WiMP
dsps.notes: Acquired by Jay Z and merged with TIDAL.

dsps.name: WorMee
dsps.notes: Owned by Orange. Seems to be shut down.

dsps.name: Xiaomi
dsps.notes: Chinese smartphone maker. Also runs Mi Music.

dsps.name: Yahoo Music Unlimited
dsps.notes: Shut down. Offerred to transfer users to Rhapsody.

dsps.name: YouTube Premium
dsps.notes: Subscription service that provides premium content for YouTube, YouTube Music, and Google Play Music.

dsps.name: YouTube Red
dsps.notes: Succeeded by YouTube Premium and YouTube Music.
